title: Arena Metrics Panel & Cost Placeholder
goal: Display per-model objective metrics (latency, input tokens, output tokens, model name, deployment name) alongside each response card for informed elimination decisions. Add a static cost transparency notice when the cost display flag is enabled.

in_scope: Render per-model metrics panel showing: latency (ms), input tokens, output tokens, model name, deployment name
Keep metrics visible with each response card during arena rounds
Handle missing token values by rendering 'N/A' without breaking layout
Gate metrics panel behind feature_arena_metrics_panel flag
Add static cost transparency notice: 'Cost estimation not available via SDK — see pricing page'
Gate cost notice behind feature_arena_cost_display flag
Ensure metrics render consistently for both arena mode and standard comparison mode
out_of_scope: Dynamic cost calculation or pricing logic changes

inputs: Inference result dicts with: deployment_name, model_name, latency_ms, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens
PRD Week 1 section 4 — Arena metrics panel, Cost display placeholder
outputs: src/app.py — updated results rendering with metrics panel and cost notice
dependencies: 0_mvp/Part 05 — inference results include latency and token fields
checklist: When feature_arena_metrics_panel is True, render a metrics section within each result column
Display deployment_name as column header (already exists — verify consistency)
Display model_name as a metric or label within the column
Display latency_ms with 'ms' unit label using existing _format_latency_value()
Render all token values as 'N/A' when None without breaking layout
When feature_arena_cost_display is True, render st.info() with static message: 'Cost estimation not available via SDK — see pricing page'
Position cost notice near the metrics area for each model or as a global banner
Verify metrics remain visible and correct across multiple arena rounds
acceptance_criteria: Each successful model result shows latency, input tokens, output tokens, model name, and deployment name when metrics panel is enabled
Missing token values render as 'N/A' without breaking layout
Cost notice displays the exact static message specified in the PRD
No dynamic cost calculation is executed when cost display flag is enabled
Metrics panel is hidden when feature_arena_metrics_panel is false
Cost notice is hidden when feature_arena_cost_display is false
Error-state columns skip metrics and show only the error message
Metrics remain visible for every successful response across rounds
review_focus: Metrics formatting is consistent with existing _format_* helper functions
Static cost message wording matches PRD exactly
No dynamic cost calculation is accidentally triggered
Layout remains clean and readable with 2-5 columns of metrics
Metrics section integrates cleanly with arena elimination controls from Part 03
risks_or_notes: Existing _render_results() in app.py already displays some metrics — extend rather than duplicate
Verify that the metrics panel flag controls visibility without breaking the existing PRICING_ENABLED flow
5-column layout with full metrics may be visually dense on smaller screens
Consider using st.expander() for metrics on narrow viewports
definition_of_done: Metrics panel renders correctly per response when flag is enabled
All specified metrics (latency, tokens, model name, deployment name) are visible
N/A handling works for missing tokens
Cost placeholder message renders correctly when flag is enabled
No dynamic cost calculation runs in this part
Metrics panel is completely hidden when flag is disabled
